moments.title: Wimbledon heats up
moments.blurb: The world's most prestigious tennis tournament, Wimbledon, continues with intense matches as players vie for a spot in the finals, running until July 12.

angles.name: Centre Court Drama
angles.copy: Centre Court drama incoming! Wimbledon is in full swing and the tension is building. Who are you backing for the trophy this year?

angles.name: Strawberries & Cream
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream at the ready! The third round of Wimbledon is underway – any upsets on the cards today?

angles.name: Classic Tennis
angles.copy: The grass is green, the whites are crisp. It can only be Wimbledon! Tune in for all the action.

moments.title: F1 British Grand Prix at Silverstone
moments.blurb: The Formula 1 Pirelli British Grand Prix 2026 takes place at Silverstone Circuit from July 3-5, with practice and sprint qualifying today, leading up to the main race on Sunday.

angles.name: Engines Revving
angles.copy: Engines revving at Silverstone! The British Grand Prix weekend kicks off today with practice and sprint qualifying. Who's taking pole?

angles.name: Grand Prix Weekend
angles.copy: It's Grand Prix weekend! The F1 circus is at Silverstone. Get ready for high-speed drama.

angles.name: Silverstone Alive
angles.copy: Silverstone is alive! The British Grand Prix is ON. Who's your money on for the win?

moments.title: Tour de France begins
moments.blurb: The 113th edition of the Tour de France, starting in Barcelona, begins tomorrow, July 4th, covering 3,321.2 km over 21 stages until July 26th.

angles.name: Greatest Show on Two Wheels
angles.copy: The greatest show on two wheels starts tomorrow! The Tour de France 2026 kicks off in Barcelona. Who's your pick for the yellow jersey?

angles.name: Epic Cycling Drama
angles.copy: Get ready for three weeks of epic cycling drama! The Tour de France begins tomorrow. Will Tadej Pogačar defend his title?

angles.name: Grand Départ
angles.copy: The Grand Départ is almost here! The Tour de France rolls out from Barcelona tomorrow.

moments.title: England Men's T20I series vs India
moments.blurb: England Men's cricket team continues their Vitality IT20 series against India, with matches scheduled for July 4th (Manchester), 7th (Nottingham), 9th (Bristol), and 11th (Southampton).

angles.name: Big Cricket Action
angles.copy: Big cricket action this weekend! England take on India in the T20I series. Catch the second match tomorrow!

angles.name: Thrilling T20I
angles.copy: Another thrilling T20I between England and India is just around the corner. Who's bringing the fireworks?

angles.name: Cricket Fans Assemble
angles.copy: Cricket fans, assemble! The England vs India T20I series is heating up across the country.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Vince Clarke
moments.blurb: Synth-pop pioneer Vince Clarke, known for his work with Depeche Mode, Yazoo, and Erasure, turns 66 today.

angles.name: Synth-pop Legend
angles.copy: Happy 66th Birthday to synth-pop legend Vince Clarke! From Depeche Mode to Erasure, he's given us so many iconic tracks.

angles.name: Electronic Genius
angles.copy: Celebrating the electronic genius that is Vince Clarke, 66 today! What's your favourite tune he's been involved with?

angles.name: Just Can't Get Enough
angles.copy: Just Can't Get Enough of Vince Clarke! Wishing a very happy 66th birthday to the man behind some of the greatest synth anthems.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Shane Lynch
moments.blurb: Boyzone singer Shane Lynch celebrates his 50th birthday today.

angles.name: Boyzone's Own
angles.copy: Happy 50th Birthday to Boyzone's own Shane Lynch! What's your top Boyzone track?

angles.name: Half a Century
angles.copy: Half a century for Shane Lynch! Wishing a big happy birthday to the Boyzone star.

angles.name: Dublin to Dance Floor
angles.copy: From Dublin to the dance floor, Shane Lynch is 50 today! Let's hear it for the Boyzone legend.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Elle King
moments.blurb: American singer, songwriter, and actress Elle King, known for her blend of blues, rock, and country, turns 37 today.

angles.name: Rockin' Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 37th Birthday to the incredible Elle King! Time to crank up 'Ex's & Oh's'!

angles.name: Blues to Rock
angles.copy: Wishing a rockin' 37th birthday to Elle King today! What's your favourite track from her?

angles.name: Birthday Love
angles.copy: From blues to rock, Elle King is 37 today! Send her some birthday love.

moments.title: Happy Birthday 50 Cent
moments.blurb: Rapper, actor, and businessman 50 Cent, born Curtis Jackson, turns 51 on July 6th.

angles.name: Go Shorty
angles.copy: Go Shorty, it's your birthday! 50 Cent turns 51 on Monday. What's your essential 50 Cent track?

angles.name: Happy 51st
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 51st birthday to the one and only 50 Cent on Monday!

angles.name: In Da Club
angles.copy: Still In Da Club after all these years! Happy 51st to 50 Cent this Monday.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Courtney Love
moments.blurb: Iconic Hole frontwoman Courtney Love celebrates her 62nd birthday on July 9th.

angles.name: Queen of Grunge
angles.copy: Happy 62nd Birthday to the fierce and legendary Courtney Love on Thursday! What's your favourite Hole anthem?

angles.name: Iconic Frontwoman
angles.copy: Queen of grunge, Courtney Love, turns 62 on Thursday! Sending birthday wishes to an icon.

angles.name: Birthday Rock
angles.copy: It's Courtney Love's birthday on Thursday! Celebrate the Hole frontwoman's 62nd with us.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Richie Sambora
moments.blurb: Former Bon Jovi guitarist and rock icon Richie Sambora turns 67 on July 11th.

angles.name: Bon Jovi Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 67th birthday to Bon Jovi legend Richie Sambora on Saturday! What's your favourite guitar riff from him?

angles.name: Livin' on a Prayer
angles.copy: Livin' on a Prayer and turning 67! Happy Birthday to Richie Sambora this Saturday.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Rock icon Richie Sambora celebrates his 67th birthday on Saturday. Send him some love!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Suzanne Vega
moments.blurb: Acclaimed singer-songwriter Suzanne Vega, known for hits like "Luka" and "Tom's Diner," turns 67 on July 11th.

angles.name: Brilliant Songwriter
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to the brilliant Suzanne Vega on Saturday! What's your favourite track from her?

angles.name: Poetic Artistry
angles.copy: Celebrating the poetic artistry of Suzanne Vega, who turns 67 this Saturday. Remember 'Luka'?

angles.name: Tom's Diner
angles.copy: From Tom's Diner to the airwaves, happy 67th birthday to Suzanne Vega on Saturday!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Lil' Kim
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning rapper and fashion icon Lil' Kim celebrates her 51st birthday on July 11th.

angles.name: Queen Bee
angles.copy: It's Lil' Kim's birthday on Saturday! The Queen Bee turns 51. What's your favourite track from her?

angles.name: Happy 51st
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Happy 51st Birthday to the one and only Lil' Kim this Saturday.

angles.name: Superstardom
angles.copy: From Junior M.A.F.I.A. to solo superstardom, happy 51st to Lil' Kim on Saturday!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Alessia Cara
moments.blurb: Canadian singer-songwriter Alessia Cara, known for her hit "Here" and Grammy for Best New Artist, turns 30 on July 11th.

angles.name: Milestone Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 30th Birthday to the amazing Alessia Cara on Saturday! What's your favourite song from her?

angles.name: Grammy Winner
angles.copy: Celebrating a milestone birthday for Alessia Cara, who turns 30 this Saturday! Let's hear it for the Grammy winner.

angles.name: Global Stardom
angles.copy: From 'Here' to global stardom, Alessia Cara is 30 on Saturday! Send her some birthday love.

moments.title: Summer Holidays are Here!
moments.blurb: The school summer holidays are starting or fast approaching for many across the UK, bringing longer days and family fun.

angles.name: School's Out
angles.copy: School's out for summer (or very, very soon)! Who's excited for the holidays?

angles.name: Great Summer Getaway
angles.copy: The great summer getaway is beginning! Are you heading off or enjoying a staycation?

angles.name: No School Runs
angles.copy: Longer days, warmer nights, and no school runs! Happy summer holidays to all the students and parents!

moments.title: Little House on the Prairie reimagined
moments.blurb: A new adaptation of the beloved classic "Little House on the Prairie" begins streaming on Netflix on July 9th.

angles.name: Walnut Grove Revisited
angles.copy: Get ready to revisit Walnut Grove! A brand new adaptation of 'Little House on the Prairie' lands on Netflix next Thursday.

angles.name: Nostalgia Alert
angles.copy: Nostalgia alert! The Ingalls family is back with a new 'Little House on the Prairie' series on Netflix from July 9th.

angles.name: What's New on Netflix
angles.copy: What's new on Netflix? A reimagined 'Little House on the Prairie' arrives next Thursday. Will you be watching?
